blockingIssues.description: Legacy cleanup in `isAfGeneratedConfig` can still auto-delete certain untracked native `rulesync.jsonc` files that match the 5-key legacy shape without explicit marker/signature, so native-project protection is not fully guaranteed.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce handoff accuracy: when a required validator is omitted, workers must set `followedProcedure` to false and provide explicit omission rationale tied to available scripts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of `cli-core-setup-path-argument-contract-fix` found `followedProcedure: true` while required `test:integration:real` evidence was absent from verification commands.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update `.factory/services.yaml` `test_integration_real` entry to match current repo scripts
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate of prior-round recommendation/rejection; changing this would require mutating an existing shared command entry rather than additive update
